name: linear-todos
title: Linear Todos
description: Manage Linear todos with smart natural-language date parsing — list, create, remind, review, and a morning digest.
author: avegancafe

commands.name: list
commands.title: List Todos
commands.subtitle: Linear Todos
commands.description: List your todos grouped by urgency, with actions to complete and snooze.

commands.name: remind
commands.title: Remind Me to
commands.subtitle: Linear Todos
commands.description: Create a todo from natural language (e.g. "water the plants by eod !urgent").

arguments.name: text
arguments.placeholder: water the plants by end of day

commands.name: setup
commands.title: Setup
commands.subtitle: Linear Todos
commands.description: Pick your todo team and workflow states.

preferences.name: timezone
preferences.title: Timezone
preferences.description: Optional IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York) for end-of-day calculations. Leave blank to use your system timezone.
